description:
A critical customer conversation has been accidentally deleted and needs to be recovered in the FreeScout help desk at http://localhost:8080. In the 'IT Infrastructure Support' mailbox, locate the conversation with the subject 'Cisco 2960X Switch Replacement - Building C Floor 3' currently in the Deleted folder and restore it to an active/published state so it appears in the normal conversation list.

Login credentials:
- Email: admin@helpdesk.local
- Password: Admin123!

metadata.target_subject: Cisco 2960X Switch Replacement - Building C Floor 3
